Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Complete language test suite, fix TS Result erasure, add let _ support

Test suite (6 new files, 218 total tests across 12 files):
- operator_test: pipe, ++, deep equality, ^, bitwise, interpolation
- type_system_test: generics, variants, function types, named records
- error_test: ok/err, effect fn, auto-?, guard else err, do block
- string_test: interpolation, heredoc, escapes, string stdlib ops
- scope_test: block scope, shadowing, for/match binding, closures
- edge_cases_test: empty collections, boundaries, nested types

Compiler fixes:
- TS Result erasure unified: __Err value type for err() in non-effect context
- TS match on Result handles both __Err values and thrown errors
- TS assert_eq with err() uses try-catch wrapper
- TS int.to_string no longer appends .0
- Unused variable false positive for fn-type parameters fixed
- let _ = expr now supported (parser accepts _ as variable name)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial commit: FSAD research project setup

- Survey: 41-paper FSAD comprehensive survey with detailed paper notes
- Paper outline: pattern-aware dual memory (dominant + residual) with
  concrete method blueprint (DPMM, Mahalanobis, product gating)
- Research notes: decomposition techniques, scoring formulations,
  support enrichment, rare-normal boundary analysis
- Docker: PyTorch 2.5.1 + CUDA 12.1 setup for reproducible experiments
- Project config: CLAUDE.md, agents, contexts, hooks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add 10 Web Dev Skills tools (v1.11.0)

New tools in src/tools/webdev/:
- generate_component — React/Vue/Nuxt scaffold with Tailwind/CSS-Modules/none
- scaffold_page — full page with sections + SEO head (Nuxt/Next/Vue)
- seo_meta — HTML meta + Open Graph + Twitter Card + JSON-LD structured data
- accessibility_audit — 13 WCAG A/AA rules (alt, labels, tabindex, keyboard, etc.)
- api_client — typed TypeScript fetch wrapper with error handling + auth strategies
- test_generator — Vitest/Jest/Playwright unit/integration/e2e test files
- responsive_layout — mobile-first Tailwind, CSS Grid, or Flexbox layouts
- security_scan — 16 security rules: XSS, eval, SQL injection, secrets, CORS, etc.
- design_tokens — 11-step color scales + typography/spacing/radius → CSS/Tailwind/JSON
- perf_hints — Core Web Vitals analysis: LCP, CLS, INP, FCP, TTFB patterns

Also exclude pre-existing broken e2e.ts from tsconfig (not imported anywhere).
Total tools: 24 → 34.

fix: WebSocket 연결 실패 근본 수정 — accept() 후 close() + isLiveActive 오류 복구

- streams.py: websocket.accept() 없이 close(4001) → 브라우저가 close code 못 받음 → 무한 재연결 루프 수정
- background.js: isLiveActive() fetch 실패 시 return false → return true (일단 연결 시도)

commit.message:
fix: overlays not showing after models complete

Two bugs:
1. setViewerKey fired before loadStudy resolved, so SliceViewer
   remounted with empty availableModels and fetched slice without overlays.
   Fixed by awaiting loadStudy before setViewerKey.
2. useEffect([studyId]) captured stale fetchSlice closure missing
   the new availableModels. Fixed by running on mount only ([]),
   since the component is re-keyed externally when segmentations change.

Make monitor script crash-resilient with auto-restart and visible error output

- Wrap WinRT setup in Start-Monitor function with detailed error logging
- Add auto-restart loop (up to 20 retries with backoff)

- Track consecutive errors in main loop, restart after 10 failures
- Add crash.log file for persistent error tracking
- Run PS1 directly (visible) on first install so user can see errors
- VBS launcher redirects stderr to crash.log for background runs

commit.message:
fix: NL search — show neighborhood in search box, fix clear/reset

1. Initialize search box from neighborhood param so user sees what
   they searched (e.g. "Chelsea" appears in the search input)
2. Skip client-side text filter when query matches the neighborhood
   already filtered by the API (prevents double-filtering → 0 results)
3. Clear neighborhood/borough URL params when search is reset so
   the "Clear all filters" button fully resets the search

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement scaling improvements: adaptive spray, neighborhood routing, size tiers, Wi-Fi Direct

Rust core (191 tests):
- Adaptive spray count: L = ceil(sqrt(N) × 1.5) based on observed peer density
- Neighborhood-aware routing: bridge peers prioritized in spray target selection
- Message size tiers: Small (≤15KB mesh), Medium (≤64KB direct preferred), Large (direct required)
- Wi-Fi Direct transfer queue with retry logic, timeout, and connection state tracking
- New FFI: recommendTransferStrategy, processRemoteNeighborhoodForPeer, wifi_direct_* methods

Platform integration:
- iOS: MultipeerManager with MCSession, deterministic connection deduplication, dual transport in MeshService
- Android: WiFiDirectManager with Wi-Fi P2P, TCP socket transfer, length-prefixed protocol
- Both platforms: transfer strategy queries, Wi-Fi Direct queue management, neighborhood peer tagging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix stream abort crash — await finalMessage to catch errors properly

The abort error was thrown asynchronously and escaped the catch block,
crashing the process on every client disconnect. Now uses await on
finalMessage() so the error is caught inline.

commit.message:
Add cost-aware demand model V2 and remove flawed Monte Carlo

- demand_model_v2.py: Cost-optimal forecaster using newsvendor critical
  fractile (Cu/(Cu+Co)) that accounts for expiry risk in overage cost.
  3-way comparison shows V2 reduces inventory cost by ~39% vs V1 q95.
- play_game.py: Remove run_monte_carlo() which sampled demands uniformly
  ignoring covariates, producing misleading cost estimates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix mobile keyboard word suggestion duplication race condition

After compositionend, xterm fires onData with the same composed text.
Previously we set composingRef=false immediately in compositionend,
so the subsequent onData got through and duplicated the input. Now we
keep the composing flag true for 50ms after compositionend to suppress
that spurious onData event.

Deux interfaces : superadmin et client

Superadmin :
- Dashboard revu : stats payés/non payés/désactivés, filtres, recherche
- Bouton paiement toggle ($ Payer / Payé) par client
- Bouton stop activité (Stop / Activer) par client

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Member Service: Fix skip/take pagination in GetAll (closes #22006) (#22010)

* Fixed issue with GetAll on MemberService where skip/take weren't translated to pageIndex/pageSize.

* fix(core): fix paging in MemberService.GetAll skip/take overload

The skip/take overload was passing skip and take directly as pageIndex
and pageSize to the repository, causing incorrect pagination for any
non-zero skip value. Use PaginationHelper.ConvertSkipTakeToPaging to
correctly convert skip/take to page index/size, matching the pattern
used by all other services.

Also update ContentTypeIndexingNotificationHandler to call the
pageIndex/pageSize overload directly, avoiding the redundant conversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Treat empty or whitespace filter as no filter in MemberService.GetAll

---------

commit.message:
Fix monitor installer process kill, reduce warning spam, add debug logs

- Installer now uses WMI to find and kill ALL processes with
  "call_monitor" or "ClinicaCallMonitor" in their command line
- Adds 2s delay after kill to ensure processes are dead before restart
- Changed "no agent" call log from warn to info (stops yellow toast spam)
- Added socket connect debug log with identity info
- Simplified process-kill PowerShell commands for reliability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor(pm): use typed PackageLock in outdated check (#2674)

Replace raw `serde_json::Value` access with typed `PackageLock` and
`LockPackage` struct fields in `is_pkg_lock_outdated`. Simplify
`deps_map_equals_lock` from 23 lines to 6 by accepting typed
`Option<&HashMap>` directly. Simplify engines comparison via
`PartialEq`.

commit.message:
docs: add bilingual README with screenshots and animated demo

## Changes

### README.md
Complete rewrite of project documentation:
- Bilingual structure (English first, Chinese second)
- Language selector at the top with anchor links
- Updated feature list reflecting current capabilities:
  * Telemetry capture from AC shared memory
  * Best lap vs reference comparison
  * Interactive Plotly telemetry charts (speed, throttle, brake, steering)
  * Track Map 2D visualization with speed gradient coloring
  * Linked track map ↔ telemetry interaction (click map, highlight traces)
  * AI coaching analysis via LLM
  * Demo mode with synthetic data
- Screenshot and animation placeholders with detailed captions
- Installation instructions (uv and pip)
- Quick start guide (init → API key → demo → record → analyze)
- CLI reference with all commands and options
- Architecture overview matching real module layout
- Roadmap and contributing guidelines
- License (MIT)

### docs/images/
Created placeholder directory with 4 media files:
1. telemetry_traces.png — Speed/throttle/brake/steering charts
2. track_map.png — 2D racing line with speed gradient
3. track_map_linked.gif — Animated demo of click interaction
4. full_report.png — Full page overview

All images referenced via markdown ![alt](path) syntax for automatic GitHub rendering.
Descriptions below each image explain what to capture.

Both English and Chinese sections include all 4 images with localized captions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- SpreadRecord codegen for Rust target
- float.to_string preserves .0 (Rust + TS)
- Let type annotations always emitted when present
- Empty list comparison diagnostic

New test files:
- lang/function_test.almd (17 tests)
- lang/pattern_test.almd (18 tests)

Other:
- Rewrite stdlib tests to use test blocks
- Remove .minigit/ and codopsy-report.json from repo

repository.description: A functional programming language optimized for LLM code generation. Compiles to Rust, TypeScript, JavaScript, and WebAssembly.

commit.message:
feat: add sequential Prev/Next navigation in manual override mode

When Manual Override is toggled ON, replace the standard Like/Skip buttons with:
  - ◀ Prev: navigate to previous image sequentially
  - ▶ Next: navigate to next image sequentially
  - 👍 Like: keep the feedback button for ratings

In Auto mode, the original Like/Skip feedback buttons remain unchanged.

When Manual Override is activated, the first image in the library is set as
the initial override target. Navigation wraps around at list boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix monitor installer: kill old processes, validate agent, show agent name

Root cause: Re-installing the monitor wrote the new script to disk but
the OLD PowerShell process (with empty agent) kept running, sending
heartbeats and calls with Agent="". The new installer now:

- Kills all old monitor PowerShell and VBS processes before starting
- Shows the embedded agent name during installation
- PS1 script exits with FATAL if agentName is empty
- PS1 startup log shows which agent it's running as
- Removed duplicate warning logs for missing agent in /incoming_call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add sector rotation v2: chart images, RS vs TOPIX, investment signals, daily/weekly/monthly auto-dispatch

- sectorRotationConfig.ts: 17-sector ETF list (8697.T for 証券業), signal threshold constants, QuickChart config
- types.ts: SectorReturn + RS fields, MacroData + JGB 2Y/spread/multi-period FX, SectorRotationReport
- sectorRotation.ts: fetchJgbData (2Y+10Y), TOPIX multi-period base, RS calc, trend-based signals (no USD/JPY level thresholds), QuickChart.io horizontal bar chart (green=outperform/red=underperform), getSectorRotationReport(reportType)
- slack.ts: sendSectorRotationReport accepts SectorRotationReport, sends Slack blocks (macro + signals + chart images)
- main.ts: checkSectorRotationAuto() routes daily/weekly/monthly by weekday; manual test functions; setupTrigger uses everyDays(1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: migrate ESLint to flat config for Next.js 16 compatibility

Next.js 16 removed `next lint` command. Migrated from .eslintrc.json
to eslint.config.mjs (ESLint 9 flat config format). Downgraded
React Compiler lint rules to warnings to unblock CI.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Heart icon with blue→green gradient background (matches navbar logo).
Generated dynamically via next/og ImageResponse at 32x32 and 180x180.
Updated themeColor to brand blue (#2563eb).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: use MicroPython-hosted esp-open-sdk and bump versions

Switched ESP8266 to the standalone esp-open-sdk toolchain hosted by
MicroPython (same as their CI), fixing all toolchain compatibility
issues. Bumped MicroPython to v1.27.0 and ESP-IDF to v5.5.3 for ESP32.
Added CHANGELOG.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: normalise job_id -> id from run endpoint response

Backend returns {job_id, status} but frontend expects {id, status}.
Polling was calling /api/jobs/undefined and silently failing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: persist checklist item edits when updating task config from My Tasks

The edit path in TaskFromTemplateModal returned early after updating
site_checklists, skipping the code that saves checklist items to the
template's recurrence_pattern and updates today's pending task instances.
Edited questions were silently discarded on save.

Now the edit path also writes items to the template (for future cron runs)
and patches today's checklist_tasks so changes appear immediately.
